# CVOpenGLTextureGetName(_:)

**Function**

Returns the texture target name of a CoreVideo OpenGL texture.

## Declaration

```swift
func CVOpenGLTextureGetName(_ image: CVOpenGLTexture) -> GLuint
```

## Parameters

- **image**: The Core Video OpenGL texture whose texture target name you want to obtain.

## Return Value

The target name of the texture.

## Discussion

See the [http://www.opengl.org/documentation/] for more information about texture targets.

## Inspecting Textures

- **CVOpenGLTextureGetTarget(_:)**: Returns the texture target (for example, `GL_TEXTURE_2D`) of an OpenGL texture.
- **CVOpenGLTextureGetCleanTexCoords(_:_:_:_:_:)**: Returns the texture coordinates for the part of the image that should be displayed.
- **CVOpenGLTextureIsFlipped(_:)**: Determines whether an OpenGL texture is flipped vertically.
- **CVOpenGLTextureGetTypeID()**: Obtains the Core Foundation ID for the Core Video OpenGL texture type.
